title: Vera Bradley Q2 2020 Earnings Breakthrough
text: Vera Bradley reported better-than-expected second-quarter 2020 earnings results driven by recovery in store sales and strong online demand. Earnings per share were $0.32, beating consensus estimates of a $0.07 loss, a significant earnings surprise of positive 450+%. Revenue was $131.8 million, above the consensus projection of $100.5 million. The company's e-commerce revenue doubled year over year with new customer acquisition on VeraBradley.com up triple digits. This strong Q2 performance demonstrated the company's ability to capitalize on pandemic-driven demand shifts toward online shopping and home goods.
